name: Monster Energy Original
description: The classic green Monster. Bold, full-flavoured energy with a punch.

name: Monster Ultra White
description: Light, crisp and refreshing with a citrus twist. Zero sugar.

name: Monster Ultra Blue
description: A lighter blue citrus flavour. Zero sugar with a cool, fresh finish.

name: Monster Ultra Red
description: Mixed berry flavour with zero sugar and a smooth, fruity taste.

name: Monster Ultra Gold
description: Fresh pineapple flavour. Zero sugar with a golden, tropical kick.

name: Monster Ultra Sunrise
description: Orange and citrus blend. Zero sugar with a bright, tangy taste.

name: Monster Ultra Black
description: Dark berry flavour. Zero sugar with a sophisticated, intense taste.

name: Monster Ultra Watermelon
description: Sweet watermelon with a light, refreshing finish. Zero sugar.

name: Monster Ultra Fiesta
description: Mango flavoured zero sugar drink with a vibrant, tropical character.

name: Monster Juiced Mango Loco
description: Real fruit juice blended with Monster energy. Mango and citrus forward.

name: Monster Juiced Monarch
description: Peach and nectarine juice blend with Monster's signature energy base.

name: Monster Juiced Bad Apple
description: Crisp apple juice mixed with Monster energy for a tart, refreshing hit.

name: Monster Juiced Pacific Punch
description: Tropical punch with real fruit juice. Smooth, sweet and energising.

name: Monster Pipeline Punch
description: Passion fruit, orange and guava blend. A Hawaiian-inspired energy drink.

name: Monster Punch Papillon
description: Mixed fruit punch with a bold, sweet flavour and full Monster energy hit.

name: Monster Reserve Orange Dreamsicle
description: Creamy orange and vanilla flavour reminiscent of a classic ice cream treat.

name: Monster Reserve Watermelon
description: Watermelon flavoured reserve edition with Monster's signature energy blend.

name: Monster Lewis Hamilton Edition
description: Peach and nectarine flavoured zero sugar drink from Monster's F1 collaboration.

name: Monster Nitro Super Dry
description: Nitrogen-infused for a smooth texture. Dry citrus taste with zero sugar.

name: Monster Nitro Gold Strike
description: Nitrogen-infused peach flavour. Velvety smooth with a light, golden finish.
